ui.components package

ui.components.activity_card module

class ui.components.activity_card.ActivityCard(activity_data, on_delete=None, on_edit=None, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: MDCard

Custom UI card used to display a vacation activity.

Provides: - Activity details (time, name, location, notes) - Delete functionality with confirmation dialog

confirm_delete(*args)[source]

Opens a confirmation dialog before deleting the activity.

delete_activity(*args)[source]

Deletes the activity from the database and removes the card with animation.

edit_activity(*args)[source]

ui.components.vacation_card module

class ui.components.vacation_card.ClickCard(vacation=None, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: MDCard

Custom clickable card used to open vacation details screen.

When clicked, it navigates to the vacation details screen and passes the selected vacation object.

go_to_detail()[source]

Navigates to the vacation details screen.

on_touch_down(touch)[source]

Handles touch down event to detect card click.

on_touch_up(touch)[source]

Handles touch release and triggers navigation if clicked.

ui.components.vacation_card.load_resized_image(path, width, height)[source]

Loads and resizes an image for use in Kivy UI.

The image is resized using PIL and converted into a Kivy-compatible texture.

Parameters:

  • path – Path to the image file

  • width – Target width

  • height – Target height

Returns:

Kivy texture
